title: Variables, Expressions, Equations, and Practical Formulas · Worked Case: Formula Rearrange
summary: Build reusable cost, distance, energy, and capacity formulas from stakeholder requirements. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math beg formula rearrange increment in a formula-driven planning calculator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Rearrange literal formulas to isolate a required quantity and verify dimensions.
Solve one-variable linear equations while preserving equality at every transformation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
